name: New or Renamed User Account with '$' Character
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ilyas Ochkov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: New or Renamed User Account with '$' Character
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of a user with the "$" character. This can be used by attackers to hide a user or trick detection systems that lack the parsing mechanisms.


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4720 AND LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%$%') OR ("Event ID"=4781 AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE '%$%')) AND (NOT(("Event ID"=4720 AND "Target Username"='HomeGroupUser$'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY New or Renamed User Account with '$' Character on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4720 AND LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%$%') OR ("Event ID"=4781 AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE '%$%')) AND (NOT(("Event ID"=4720 AND "Target Username"='HomeGroupUser$'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: New or Renamed User Account with '$' Character
